gaps: A stats filter for docket class (e.g. SCOTUS miscellaneous/IFP vs paid docket) — the strongest signal here was the 'Misc' docket number, but base rates cannot be cut by it
Snapshot enrichment: docket entries or petition text for pre-digital SCOTUS cases; the current snapshot is metadata-only
A --term or date cut was unusable because the snapshot has no filing date to anchor it
helpful: fedcourts stats --court scotus for the resolved-disposition base rate
fedcourts paths to resolve output locations
notes: Base rates were the main quantitative anchor; fedcourts query returned mostly old digitized cases with sparse metadata, which confirmed the corpus skews old but did not surface close comparables for a misc-docket prisoner petition.
